items.name: Crimson Insignia Knight's Helmet
items.description: A hero felled amidst the crimson stained battleground. The scarlet hue, a silent testament to the eternal strife rendering its creation, the remnants of wars long forgotten, etched into its faded metal. The crimson river ever flows, a symbol of battles yet to come.
